semantic.role: Vitest integration test suite for the ViewService module, validating its behavior with mocked LLM clients and file system fixtures.
responsibilities: Creates temporary test directories and file system fixtures for isolated ViewService testing.
Mocks LLM client responses to simulate view generation without external API calls.
Asserts that ViewService correctly processes Spine units and produces expected view outputs.
Verifies error handling and edge cases in the view generation pipeline.
outOfScope: Production deployment or runtime service hosting.
Direct interaction with external LLM APIs.
Persistence of test artifacts beyond the test session.
User interface rendering or web server functionality.
invariants: Must remain a pure test file with no side effects on production systems.
Must mock all external dependencies (LLM, file system) to ensure deterministic tests.
Must clean up temporary directories after each test to avoid resource leaks.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Ensure the ViewService correctly generates architectural views from Spine units in a controlled, reproducible test environment.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Minor updates or maintenance; the vague commit message 'iZOy's easy commit. 'haha/' suggests non-functional changes like formatting or comments, but no specific intent is discernible from code evidence.
